engine.ladder_reasoning: A venue is a PLACE the visitor evaluates by browsing spaces, galleries, floorplans, capacities and location/map — the physical rooms and photos ARE the decision. Heavy trust/testimonial content supports but doesn't replace 'is this the right room for my event'.

goal.one_action: submit the 'Check Availability' inquiry form for an event date (secondary: schedule an on-site tour via Calendly)

structure.archetype_note: Multi-page venue site: home + audience/space pages funnel to a lead-capture availability form and a Calendly tour scheduler. Footer exposes more pages (FAQ, Blog, Team, Reviews, History) not in main nav.

unmapped.observed: Combine Spaces for a Seamless Experience
unmapped.why_no_fit: cross-sell/upsell of combining multiple rooms — not a standard section id

unmapped.observed: Tour walkthrough page (Why touring is the smartest next step / What happens During your Tour)
unmapped.why_no_fit: a whole page devoted to selling/explaining the tour appointment step before the Calendly embed — a pre-booking rationale sub-funnel with no clean canonical id

confidence.why: fetch_quality=rendered and the primary conversion form is an opaque leadconnectorhq/GoHighLevel iframe (fields not inspectable); appointments page title looks like a post-submit state, hinting at session-dependent capture. Section intent is clear, so classification is solid but form/goal detail is inferred.

gap_findings: Venue 'place' sites carry a strong secondary trust/expertise argument (in-house catering, chef-led cuisine, event coordination) plus a bookable-space catalog — the single-engine 'place' pick doesn't capture that it's simultaneously selling a coordinated service.
A dedicated pre-booking 'why tour' rationale page (a mini-funnel step between browse and Calendly) has no clean canonical section; it collapses awkwardly into howItWorks.
Custom-quote / 'we don't publish final prices' pricing model (ranges + seasonal tiers + deposit terms) is only loosely served by 'packages', which implies fixed price display.
